channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Rubio meets Orbán in Budapest as US and Hungary are to sign a civilian nuclear pact
item.description: Marco Rubio is backing Viktor Orbán ahead of Hungary’s April election during a visit to Budapest

item.title: Team USA athletes seek to break Olympic medal drought at Winter Games
item.description: Team USA is looking to get this week off to a golden start after failing to pick up any medals on Sunday. CBS News' Seth Doane reports from Italy.

item.title: Children are being kept in immigration custody longer than allowed, advocates say
item.description: Immigration advocates say the Trump administration, as part of its immigration crackdown, is keeping minors detained for longer than the permitted by ...

item.title: Investigators chase critical leads as Nancy Guthrie search enters third week
item.description: Investigators are following up on key leads in the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie as the search for the missing 84-year-old moves into its third week....

item.title: Police say kidnapped grandfather likely mistaken for crime network figure
item.description: Australian police say a Sydney grandfather was taken from his home by assailants who likely thought he was involved in a "criminal world."

item.title: Nancy Guthrie live updates: Savannah Guthrie sends message to abductor
item.description: The search is intensifying for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.

item.title: WATCH: Former President Obama responds to President Trump’s racist video post
item.description: Barack Obama spoke out a week after President Trump's social media account posted a video depicting him and Michelle Obama as apes, condemning behavio...

item.title: Parents of 19-year-old counselor say she died a hero in Camp Mystic flood
item.description: In their first television interview, the parents of 19-year-old Katherine Ferruzzo say she died a hero trying to save children from the devastating fl...

item.title: Investigators reviewing retail sales records for clues in Nancy Guthrie case
item.description: Investigators are reviewing surveillance footage and purchase records at retail stores, including Walmart, where they believe the suspect in the Nancy...

item.title: WATCH: 19th-century shipwreck found in Lake Michigan
item.description: Shipwreck hunters have discovered the remains of the Lac La Belle, a luxury steamer that sank in Lake Michigan back in 1872 - completing a quest that ...

item.title: Trump’s border czar says ‘small’ security force will remain in Minnesota after enforcement drawdown
No clear path to ending the partial government shutdown as lawmakers dig in over DHS oversight
DNA recovered from glove found near Guthrie home that appears to match glove worn by suspect, FBI says
item.description: The FBI says a glove containing DNA was found about two miles from Nancy Guthrie’s Arizona home and appears to match those worn by a masked person out...
